case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. CATHERINE ZHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CATHERINE LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, CATHERINE LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1188 MISSION STREET, #1406 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
